recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Little Nemo: Adventures in Slumberland
recommendations.overview: A little boy whose dreams transcend reality is sucked into his own fantasy, which is everything he has dreamed of, until he unleashes an old secret that may not only destroy this perfect dream world but reality itself.
recommendations.director: William T. Hurtz, Masanori Hata, Masami Hata

recommendations.title: Kiwi!
recommendations.overview: The story of a Kiwi who spends his whole life working towards achieving his dream.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Sahara
recommendations.overview: A young cobra and his scorpion best friend go on a journey across the Sahara desert to save a new-found love.

recommendations.title: The Rain Children
recommendations.overview: There is a world with two towns that are big enemies: Pyross and Hydross.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.
